name: EuiSuperSelect
visualDescription: A custom-styled select control that looks like a bordered input button showing the selected option's content (text, icon, or rich node) and a trailing chevron. Clicking opens a popover listbox of options rather than the browser's native select dropdown. NOT EuiSelect (EuiSuperSelect uses a custom popover and supports rich option content; EuiSelect uses the native browser select element).

append.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming after input.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

prepend.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming before input.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

fullWidth.description:
Expand to fill 100% of the parent.
Defaults to `fullWidth` prop of `<EuiForm>`.

placeholder.description: Placeholder to display when the current selected value is empty.

options.description:
Pass an array of options that must at least include:
`value`: storing unique value of item,
`inputDisplay`: what shows inside the form input when selected
`dropdownDisplay` (optional): what shows for the item in the dropdown

itemClassName.description: Classes for the context menu item

onChange.description: You must pass an `onChange` function to handle the update of the value

hasDividers.description:
Change to `true` if you want horizontal lines between options.
This is best used when options are multi-line.

isOpen.description: Controls whether the options are shown. Default: false

popoverProps.description:
Optional props to pass to the underlying [EuiInputPopover](/#/layout/popover#popover-attached-to-input-element).
Allows fine-grained control of the popover dropdown menu, including
`repositionOnScroll` for EuiSuperSelects used within scrollable containers,
and customizing popover panel styling.

Does not accept a nested `popoverProps.isOpen` property - use the top level
`isOpen` API instead.
